footer.tagline: Fast websites that convert, rank well in search, and look the part

hero.title: Websites Built to Turn More Visitors Into Customers
hero.description: At FervorWeb, we build high-performance websites designed to load fast, rank well, and convert visitors into paying customers.
hero.metric-3-text: Of visitors leave after 3 seconds. Yours won't.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: Talk with one of our experts about your website, conversion goals, and growth opportunities. We'll suggest practical ways to attract more visitors and turn them into customers.

audit.title: Website Audit
audit.description: A detailed analysis of your website's performance, user experience, SEO, and conversion potential. Discover what’s holding your site back and how to fix it.

development.title: Website Development
development.description: We design and build fast, modern websites optimized for performance, search engines, and conversions.

process.section-description: See exactly how we work with clients from first contact to a high-performing, conversion-optimized website. This roadmap shows each step so you know what to expect and how we ensure results.

step-1.title: Free Consultation
step-1.description: Talk to one of our experts about your website, goals, and conversion challenges. We’ll show you opportunities for growth before you spend a single dime.

step-2.title: Audit & Analysis
step-2.description: Most redesigns fail to improve conversions. We analyze your site using scientific web design principles, evaluating usability, performance, and conversion potential. Only after we know what works, we make changes.

step-3.title: Design & Development
step-3.description: We create a fast, conversion-optimized website, implementing only changes proven to increase conversions through A/B testing and user behavior analysis.

step-4.title: Launch & Grow
step-4.description: Your site goes live, but the work doesn’t stop. We track results, optimize designs based on data, and continually improve conversions so your website keeps generating revenue.
